mapper.select:
select count(*) FROM ALARM A LEFT JOIN EMP E ON A.ALARM_EMP = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON A.ALARM_DEPT = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN AUTH AU ON A.ALARM_AUTH = AU.AUTH_NO
A.ALARM_VALID = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(A.ALARM_TITLE) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.ALARM_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.ALARM_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

select * from ( select rownum rn, I.* from ( SELECT A.ALARM_ID AS alarmId, A.ALARM_EMP AS alarmEmp, A.ALARM_DEPT AS alarmDept, A.ALARM_AUTH AS alarmAuth, A.ALARM_TYPE_NO AS alarmTypeNo, A.ALARM_TITLE AS alarmTitle, A.ALARM_CONTENT AS alarmContent, A.ALARM_DATE AS alarmDate, A.ALARM_VALID AS alarmValid, E.EMP_NAME AS empName, D.DNAME AS deptName, AU.AUTH_NAME AS authName FROM ALARM A LEFT JOIN EMP E ON A.ALARM_EMP = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON A.ALARM_DEPT = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN AUTH AU ON A.ALARM_AUTH = AU.AUTH_NO
A.ALARM_VALID = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(A.ALARM_TITLE) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.ALARM_CONTENT) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.ALARM_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY A.ALARM_DATE DESC ) I ) where rn between #{page.startRow} and #{page.endRow}
SELECT ALARM_TYPE_NO AS alarmTypeNo, ALARM_TYPE_NAME AS alarmTypeName FROM ALARM_TYPE ORDER BY ALARM_TYPE_NO desc

SELECT A.ALARM_ID AS alarmId, A.ALARM_EMP AS alarmEmp, A.ALARM_DEPT AS alarmDept, A.ALARM_AUTH AS alarmAuth, A.ALARM_TYPE_NO AS alarmTypeNo, A.ALARM_TITLE AS alarmTitle, A.ALARM_CONTENT AS alarmContent, A.ALARM_DATE AS alarmDate, A.ALARM_VALID AS alarmValid, E.EMP_NAME AS empName, D.DNAME AS deptName, AU.AUTH_NAME AS authName FROM ALARM A LEFT JOIN EMP E ON A.ALARM_EMP = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON A.ALARM_DEPT = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN AUTH AU ON A.ALARM_AUTH = AU.AUTH_NO WHERE A.ALARM_ID = #{alarmId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ALARM ( ALARM_ID, ALARM_EMP, ALARM_DEPT, ALARM_AUTH, ALARM_TYPE_NO, ALARM_TITLE, ALARM_CONTENT, ALARM_DATE, ALARM_VALID ) VALUES ( 'ALARM' || ALARM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{alarmEmp}, #{alarmDept}, #{alarmAuth}, #{alarmTypeNo}, #{alarmTitle}, #{alarmContent}, SYSDATE + (9/24), 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.ALARM_ID AS alarmId, A.ALARM_EMP AS alarmEmp, A.ALARM_DEPT AS alarmDept, A.ALARM_AUTH AS alarmAuth, A.ALARM_TYPE_NO AS alarmTypeNo, A.ALARM_TITLE AS alarmTitle, A.ALARM_CONTENT AS alarmContent, A.ALARM_DATE AS alarmDate, A.ALARM_VALID AS alarmValid FROM ALARM A WHERE A.ALARM_VALID = 'Y' AND ( (A.ALARM_EMP IS NULL AND A.ALARM_DEPT IS NULL AND A.ALARM_AUTH IS NULL) OR A.ALARM_EMP = #{empId} OR A.ALARM_DEPT = #{deptNo} OR A.ALARM_AUTH = #{authNo} ) ORDER BY A.ALARM_DATE DESC

choose.when:
SELECT EMP_ID AS "code", EMP_NAME AS "name" FROM EMP WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(EMP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR UPPER(EMP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY EMP_ID

SELECT DEPTNO AS "code", DNAME AS "name" FROM DEPT WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( TO_CHAR(DEPTNO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR UPPER(DNAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY DEPTNO
choose.otherwise:
SELECT AUTH_NO AS "code", AUTH_NAME AS "name" FROM AUTH WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( TO_CHAR(AUTH_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR UPPER(AUTH_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY AUTH_NO
